title: fluffy hangover-cure american lamb hash
description: a savory breakfast dish that combines the earthy flavor of lamb with comforting, fluffy textures and a hint of spice, designed to soothe even the most severe hangovers, suitable for a buddhist temple breakfast

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: optional, but highly recommended for hangover relief

instructions: in a large pan, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium-high heat.
add the lamb and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
add the sweet potato, carrot, onion, garlic, and red bell pepper to the pan and cook until they begin to soften.
add the oat flour and stir to combine, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
push the mixture to one side of the pan and crack the eggs into the other side, cooking until the eggs are almost set.
mix the eggs into the lamb mixture and cook until everything is well combined.
press the mixture into the bottom of a greased skillet and top with cheddar cheese, if using.
transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the hash is golden brown and set.
remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
